TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Dan_Anderson, title = Dan_Anderson, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dan_Anderson} }

S.FORM: Dan Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1951, byacing te 1 ru 1 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga California, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 188 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 84 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1974 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Portland Trail Blazers. qnxan nya Dan Anderson NBA wal wayan mhngaw lga,成為 tmngasal na squilq ru mtzyaw qhoniq na squilq.qutux qutux kawas tmngasal qutux pgal 間. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Dan Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1951, byacing te 1 ru 1 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga California, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 188 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 84 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1974 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Portland Trail Blazers. qnxan nya Dan Anderson NBA wal wayan mhngaw lga,成為 tmngasal na squilq ru mtzyaw qhoniq na squilq.qutux qutux kawas tmngasal qutux pgal 間. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *an an*ers~ɕon s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru * rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa ʦ~ʨali*ornia, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu portlan* trail βlazers~ɕ. qnxan nja *an an*ers~ɕon nβa wal wajan mħŋaw lɣa,** tmŋas~ɕal na s~ɕquilq ru mtzjaw qħoniq na s~ɕquilq.qutux qutux kawas~ɕ tmŋas~ɕal qutux pɣal *. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
